justification: All pass criteria met: Both queues (order.fulfillment, order.fulfillment.dlq) identified by name. Both env vars (RABBITMQ_URL, FULFILLMENT_DLQ_NAME) identified by name. Escalations routed to Coach K with specific infrastructure items listed. new_infrastructure_required section fully populated with new_queues_topics and new_env_vars. Verdict is NOT READY. Observability correctly noted as adequate foundation (logging adequate, metrics adequate) with the infrastructure gap as the blocker. Minor deduction consideration: escalations route through Coach K but then fan out to MJ, Bird, Shaq, and Infrastructure team rather than keeping Coach K as the sole decision point — however the rubric requires routing TO Coach K, which is satisfied.

Contract compliance section frames Shaq's infrastructure decisions as a scope violation rather than purely an escalation matter — borderline treating it as a Shaq mistake vs an infrastructure gap to escalate
